text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ehaupt

Log:
  Upstream project is EOL and recommends using x11-fonts/twemoji-color-font-ttf
  instead. Mark deprecated and set an expiration time of one month.

  Also drop maintainership.

  PR:		230688 (based on)
  Submitted  by:	Volodymyr Kostyrko <arcade@b1t.name>

Changes:
  head/x11-fonts/emojione-color-font-ttf/Makefile
